# Conclusion


---
<!-- trackio-cell
{"type": "markdown", "id": "cell_fd0364739288", "created_at": "2026-07-18T03:02:12+00:00", "title": "Executive summary", "pinned": true, "pinned_at": "2026-07-18T03:02:13+00:00"}
-->
The scaled reproduction does not independently confirm the paper’s central dominance claim: iteration improved balanced accuracy by only +0.078 percentage points, while fixed-role coordination changed it by −0.105 points. Coordination hurt one of nine paired cases and helped none, offering weak partial support that it can harm performance. The K-LIVE audit confirmed the 25-item inventory and published cutoff matrix, but not contamination freedom or continued dynamism as of 2026-07-18. These are deliberately conservative verdicts from a transparent toy T4 proxy and timestamped benchmark audit.

## Scope & cost

| | This reproduction | Full replication |
|---|---|---|
| Scope | Qwen2.5-Coder-1.5B, 3 sklearn tasks × 3 seeds × 3 conditions, plus K-LIVE audit | 16 configurations × 100 Kaggle tasks × 3 seeds plus backbone ablations |
| Hardware | 1× NVIDIA T4 16 GB | 1× NVIDIA A100 80 GB per paper run |
| Compute time | 12m25s clean completed Job; about 26m42s total T4 attempts including verification | 24 h/run, roughly 4,000 runs reported |
| Cost | Approximately $0.18 in HF Jobs plus local CPU | Very large; total cost not reported by the paper |
| Outcome | Claim 1 inconclusive; Claim 2 partial; Claim 3 count/cutoffs only | Not attempted |

-->

---
<!-- trackio-cell
{"type": "code", "id": "cell_be39c3844141", "created_at": "2026-07-18T03:03:16+00:00", "title": "Package complete reproduction bundle", "command": ["uv", "run", "log_bundle.py"], "exit_code": 0, "duration_s": 2.814}
-->
````bash
$ uv run log_bundle.py
````

exit 0 · 2.8s


````python title=log_bundle.py
# /// script
# requires-python = ">=3.11"
# dependencies = ["trackio>=0.10.0"]
# ///
"""Log the complete reproduction bundle as a Trackio artifact."""

from pathlib import Path

import trackio


bundle = Path("artifact_bundle")
trackio.init(project="icml-32495-component-ablation", name="reproduction-bundle")
trackio.log_artifact(bundle, name="icml-32495-reproduction-bundle", type="dataset", aliases=["submission", "latest"])
trackio.finish()
print(f"Logged bundle: {bundle.resolve()}")

````


````output
Installed 29 packages in 30ms
* Trackio project initialized: icml-32495-component-ablation
* Trackio metrics logged to: /Users/binzhang/.cache/huggingface/trackio
* View dashboard by running in your terminal:
[1m[38;5;208mtrackio show --project "icml-32495-component-ablation"[0m
* or by running in Python: trackio.show(project="icml-32495-component-ablation")
* Created new run: reproduction-bundle
* Run finished. Uploading logs to Trackio (please wait...)
Logged bundle: /Users/binzhang/vibe_coding_repo/reproduce_icml/repro_32495/artifact_bundle

````


---
<!-- trackio-cell
{"type": "markdown", "id": "cell_109e675a5c1b", "created_at": "2026-07-18T03:03:29+00:00", "title": "Public artifacts and provenance"}
-->
Download the complete bundle from the artifact cell on the Trackio project page after publication. It contains the exact scripts, 27 raw GPU trials, summary and provenance JSON, immutable Hugging Face Job stdout, the K-LIVE audit output, paper/source notes, and the validated poster PDF/PNG/HTML.

Independent mirrors and navigation:

- Script and result dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/binzhango/icml-32495-reproduction-artifacts
